title: blackeagle686/phoenix-ai
summary: Phoenix AI 是一个专为AI后端服务设计的模块化后端基础设施SDK，支持FastAPI、Django等框架，简化了重复的后端设置，适用于生产环境，具备缓存和AI模型推理功能，适用于构建高效的后端服务。
description: 🐦‍🔥 A production-ready, modular backend infrastructure SDK designed for AI-powered Python backend services.  Whether you are building with FastAPI, Django, or a custom event-driven service, Phoenix AI eliminates repetitive backend setup.
